title: NdRz's Better Grass
body:
##  NdRz's Better Grass
                       
![fusion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4039ed99568f395848d6c19382951258a3fb3c9c_0.webp)

A simple better grass ressourcepack using [Fusion Connected Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)

For now only it affect the grass block, but I will probably add snow, podzol and other block like that in the near futur.
